sql_array: CREATE TABLE test.hits (SearchEngineID Int64, Referer String, VisitDate DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY VisitDate;

SELECT transform(SearchEngineID, [0, 1, 2, 3], ['Unknown', 'Other', 'Yandex', 'Google'], 'Not Found') AS title, COUNT() AS c FROM test.hits WHERE SearchEngineID = ALL (SELECT SearchEngineID FROM test.hits WHERE SearchEngineID > 0) GROUP BY title HAVING c > 0 ORDER BY c DESC;

SELECT search_title.title, COUNT(*) as c FROM (SELECT transform(Referer, ['yandex.ru', 'google.ru', 'example.com'], ['www.yandex', 'example.com', 'other.com'], 'none') AS title FROM test.hits WHERE Referer IS NOT NULL) AS search_title GROUP BY title HAVING c > 1 ORDER BY c DESC;
CREATE TABLE test.analytics (UserId Int32, ActionType String, CreatedAt DateTime) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY CreatedAt;

SELECT transform(ActionType, ['click', 'impression'], ['Clicked', 'Seen'], 'Unknown') AS action, COUNT(*) AS total FROM test.analytics WHERE UserId = ALL (SELECT UserId FROM test.analytics WHERE ActionType IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY action HAVING total > 0 ORDER BY total DESC;

SELECT t1.title, t2.action, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT transform(Referer, ['yandex.ru', 'google.ru'], ['www.yandex', 'example.com'], 'unknown') AS title FROM test.hits) AS t1 JOIN (SELECT transform(ActionType, ['click', 'impression'], ['clicked', 'shown'], 'none') AS action FROM test.analytics) AS t2 ON t1.title = t2.action GROUP BY t1.title, t2.action HAVING COUNT(*) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC;

SELECT transform(Referer, ['yandex.ru', 'google.ru'], ['Yandex', 'Google'], 'Other') AS ref, COUNT() OVER (PARTITION BY transform(Referer, ['yandex.ru', 'google.ru'], ['Yandex', 'Google'], 'Other')) AS partition_count FROM test.hits WHERE SearchEngineID != ALL (SELECT SearchEngineID FROM test.hits WHERE SearchEngineID < 3) GROUP BY ref ORDER BY partition_count DESC;
